repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Methodist Episcopal Church of Savona records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Methodist Episcopal Church of Savona (Savona, N.Y.)

did.abstract: One volume pre-printed register lists baptisms, marriages, probationers, members and classes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Methodist Church of Savona was built in 1843. Previous to this services had been held in the schoolhouse by the Reverend Mr. Story and other early preachers. Among the oldest members were Elisha McCoy and the Hughes family, headed by Issachar Hughes.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: This one volume pre-printed register lists baptisms, marriages, probationers, members, and classes.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Methodist Episcopal Church of Savona records, #6097. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Steuben County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Methodist Episcopal Church -- New York (State) -- Savona.
Church records and registers -- New York (State) -- Savona.

did.unittitle: Record of Members of the Methodist Episcopal Church of Savona Circuit

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists date of baptism; name of the baptised person, and, if an infant, the name of its parents or guardians; the date of birth of the baptised person, if an infant; the residence of the party baptised; the name of the officiating minister; and the names of the witnesses.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes the date, name of the parties, their residences, place of marriage, the officiating minister and witnesses.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Listed are the date, name, age, condition, residence, class leader and remarks for each probationer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes names, residence, date and mode of reception, and the name of the class leader, revised several times. A list of preachers, stewards and leaders is after the first list. After the first list the names are alphabetized.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Names, date, leader, remarks and where the class met are listed for 1-4 classes.
